description:
Advances: specled.spec_review (creates this subject)

Author .spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md as a new subject. Includes:
- spec-meta with id specled.spec_review, kind workflow, surface listing the new modules and the mix task
- spec-requirements covering: spec-first navigation, prose-headlined subject cards, per-subject tabs (Spec/Code/Coverage/Decisions), top triage panel with collapsing-when-clean behavior, inline finding badges on subject cards, misc panel for unmapped changes, self-contained HTML (no CDN deps), same artifact local and CI, GitHub Pages deploy with PR comment link
- spec-scenarios for: clean PR (triage collapses), PR with finding (triage shows + inline badge), PR with unmapped change (misc panel populated), local-only run (no network)
- spec-verification entries (file kinds for module surfaces, tagged_tests for behavior)
- realized_by bindings (filled in once modules exist; can stub initially)

Also add a requirement to specled.mix_tasks for `mix spec.review` and add `lib/mix/tasks/spec.review.ex` to its surface list.
title: Author specled.spec_review subject
